description: Preprocess RNA-Seq count data in a GCT file so that it is suitable for use in GenePattern analyses. Formerly called "PreprocessReadCounts"
author: Arthur Liberzon, David Eby, Broad Institute; Edwin Juarez, UC San Diego.
plan:
## VoomNormalize GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
VoomNormalize is a GenePattern module that Preprocess RNA-Seq count data in a GCT file so that it is suitable for use in GenePattern analyses. Formerly called "PreprocessReadCounts"

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: input.file, cls.file, output.file, expression.value.filter.threshold
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript --no-save --quiet --slave --no-restore <libdir>run_gp_preprocess_read_counts.R <libdir> --input.file\=<input.file> --cls.file\=<cls.file> --output.file\=<output.file> --expression.value.filter.threshold\=<expression.value.filter.threshold>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/voomnormalize\:1.0

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.file
parameters.description: A GCT file containing raw RNA-Seq counts, such as is produced by MergeHTSeqCounts

parameters.name: cls.file
parameters.description: A categorical CLS file specifying the phenotype classes for the samples in the GCT file.

parameters.name: expression.value.filter.threshold
parameters.description: Threshold to use when filtering CPM expression values; rows are kept only if the values (in CPM) for all columns are greater than this threshold
